rows.label: xs33440110_MSG0020
rows.name:
The Jump Drive energy charged within the cores
is decreasing, albeit slightly![ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33440110_MSG0030
rows.name:
I think Void's power itself, assimilated with the cores,
is weakening.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33440110_MSG0040
rows.name:
I see.
So this is the effect of the "spears."[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33440110_MSG0050
rows.name: To ensure our success, let's activate the remaining "spears."[ST:wait ]
